title: 25 Minute Pomodoro Timer — Focus & Productivity
description: Set a 25 minute Pomodoro timer. Boost your productivity with the classic focus block. Free online timer with alarm.
content: Boost your productivity using our 25-minute Pomodoro timer. This specific duration is scientifically proven to help maintain high focus levels while preventing burnout. Combine it with a 5-minute break for the best results.

title: 1 Minute Timer — Quick Online Countdown
description: Set a 1 minute timer instantly. Free online countdown with alarm. Perfect for quick breaks, boiling eggs, or short tasks.
content: Need exactly 60 seconds? Our 1-minute timer is the fastest way to set a short countdown. It features a high-volume alarm and a clear full-screen display. Ideal for productivity techniques like Micro-pauses or as a simple classroom tool.

title: 5 Minute Timer — Set a Five Minute Countdown
description: Start a 5 minute timer now. Free, reliable online countdown for meditation, cooking, or study breaks. Full screen supported.
content: A 5-minute timer is perfect for quick meditation sessions, boiling a soft-boiled egg, or a rapid focus burst. This online tool works on all mobile and desktop browsers with no download required.

title: 10 Minute Timer — Free Online Countdown
description: Run a 10 minute countdown with alarm. Secure and reliable browser-based timer for exercises, meetings, and kitchen use.
content: Whether you're following the '10-minute rule' to beat procrastination or simply need to time a quick break, this 10-minute timer is your reliable companion. Includes loud alarm sounds and wake-lock to keep your screen on.

title: 15 Minute Timer — Professional Countdown Tool
description: Start a 15 minute timer now. Perfect for yoga, study blocks, and quick work sprints. Free full-screen online timer.
content: The 15-minute timer is a staple for the 'Power Hour' technique and yoga flows. Our version is optimized for zero layout shift (CLS) and works in the background even if you switch tabs.

content: A 2-minute timer is most commonly used for oral hygiene (brushing teeth) or quick meditation. Start it now with a high-volume alarm.

content: A 3-minute timer is perfect for brewing a cup of light oolong tea or a quick reflection exercise. Includes full screen toggle.

content: Whether it's the 20-20-20 rule for eye health or a short focus block, this 20-minute timer will give you the precise alert you need.

content: Half an hour is a classic block for HIIT workouts, yoga sessions, or reading. This 30-minute timer acts as a reliable reminder for your busy schedule.
